torch_pattern:
w1_out = x @ w1
w3_out = x @ w3

config_template.call: fused_out = ttnn.matmul(x, w_fused, memory_config={MEM_CFG}, dtype={DTYPE}, program_config={PROGRAM_CONFIG}); branch_i = slice(fused_out, dim=-1, [{N_i_START}:{N_i_END}])
config_template.shape_constraints: N sibling matmuls sharing input x: [..., {M}, {K}]; fused weight: [{K}, sum({N_i})]
config_template.notes: observed instances: fused QKV (wq|wk|wv -> wqkv, split via nlp_create_qkv_heads / split_query_key_value_and_split_heads) and fused gate+up (w1|w3 -> w1_w3_fused, split along last dim)

weight_transform: w_fused = torch.cat([w_branch_0, ..., w_branch_{N-1}], dim=-1); biases concatenated likewise; output split along last dim at branch boundaries

placement_observations.source: llama TG attention: xqkv_fused_sharded = ttnn.matmul(x, self.wqkv, program_config=XQKV_DECODE_RING_PROGCFG, memory_config=SHARDED_QKV_OUT_RING_MEMCFG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16)
gpt-oss MoE: w1_w3_out = ttnn.matmul(experts_input, weights.w1_w3_fused, memory_config=memory_config); split along last dim into gate/up
